testcase.name: handlePolicyInactive_Returns400WithCorrectError
testcase.system-out: 15:05:10.473 [main] WARN com.insurance.claim.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler -- Policy inactive: Policy POL-10004 is not active. Current status: INACTIVE

testcase.name: handleCoverageExceeded_Returns400WithCorrectError
testcase.system-out: 15:05:10.866 [main] WARN com.insurance.claim.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler -- Coverage exceeded: Claim amount 99000.00 exceeds coverage limit 50000.00 for claim type MEDICAL

testcase.name: handleUnexpected_Returns500WithGenericMessage
testcase.system-out: 15:05:10.869 [main] ERROR com.insurance.claim.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler -- Unexpected error: Something went wrong unexpectedly java.lang.RuntimeException: Something went testcase.name: handleInvalidClaimType_Returns400WithCorrectError
testcase.system-out: 15:05:10.888 [main] WARN com.insurance.claim.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler -- Invalid claim type: Claim type VISION is not covered under policy POL-10001 or the coverage is inactive

testcase.name: handleClaimNotFound_Returns404WithCorrectError
testcase.system-out: 15:05:10.893 [main] WARN com.insurance.claim.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler -- Claim not found: Claim not found with ID: 42

testcase.name: handleValidationErrors_MultipleFieldErrors_IncludesAllMessages
testcase.system-out: 15:05:10.931 [main] WARN com.insurance.claim.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler -- Validation failed: [Policy number is required, Claim amount must be positive]

testcase.name: handleDuplicateClaim_Returns409WithCorrectError
testcase.system-out: 15:05:10.972 [main] WARN com.insurance.claim.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler -- Duplicate claim: Duplicate claim detected: policy=POL-10001, type=MEDICAL, incident_date=2026-01-01. A similar claim was submitted within the last 24 hours.

testcase.name: handlePolicyNotFound_Returns404WithCorrectError
testcase.system-out: 15:05:10.976 [main] WARN com.insurance.claim.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler -- Policy not found: Policy not found: POL-X

testcase.name: handleValidationErrors_Returns400WithFieldErrorDetails
testcase.system-out: 15:05:10.984 [main] WARN com.insurance.claim.exception.GlobalExceptionHandler -- Validation failed: [Policy number is required]
